title: [Wizard Guild, Shaft Base]
description: You stand atop a platform of flame-cut granite fashioned into a perfect circle and positioned beneath a shaft, matching in shape and stone, extending far overhead.  Several guild wizards pass through the foyer below in quiet conversation.

wayto.18052: ;e 40.times { sleep 0.1; break if GameObj.loot.any? { |obj| obj.name =~ /#{Char.name} disk$/ } }; unless GameObj.loot.any? { |obj| obj.name =~ /#{Char.name} disk$/ }; disk = Spell[511]; wait_until { disk.affordable? }; disk.cast; end; move 'up'
